allow: Bash(rm backend/entrypoint.sh && git checkout HEAD -- backend/entrypoint.sh && file backend/entrypoint.sh)

PowerShell(Get-Command node, npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:8080/_/dev; "DEV_STATUS=$\($r.StatusCode\) DEV_LEN=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "DEV_FAIL=$\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $h = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:8080/api/health; "API_STATUS=$\($h.StatusCode\) API_BODY=$\($h.Content\)" } catch { "API_FAIL=$\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(docker run -d --rm --name herfbook-web-test -p 8090:80 herfbook-web:test 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:8090/; "ROOT_STATUS=$\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'src="\(/assets/index-[^"]+\\.js\)"'\) { $jsUrl = $matches[1]; "JS_URL=$jsUrl"; $j = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "http://localhost:8090$jsUrl"; "JS_STATUS=$\($j.StatusCode\) JS_LEN=$\($j.Content.Length\)" } } catch { "FAIL=$\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:8090/_/dev; "FALLBACK_STATUS=$\($r2.StatusCode\) FALLBACK_LEN=$\($r2.Content.Length\)" } catch { "FALLBACK_FAIL=$\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; docker stop herfbook-web-test 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker run -d --rm --name herfbook-web-test -p 8090:80 herfbook-web:test 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; docker ps --filter name=herfbook-web-test --format "{{.Status}} {{.Ports}}"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:8090/; "ROOT_STATUS=$\($r.StatusCode\) ROOT_LEN=$\($r.Content.Length\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'src="\(/assets/index-[^"]+\\.js\)"'\) { $jsUrl = $matches[1]; "JS_URL=$jsUrl"; $j = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "http://localhost:8090$jsUrl"; "JS_STATUS=$\($j.StatusCode\) JS_LEN=$\($j.Content.Length\)" } } catch { "FAIL=$\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:8090/_/dev; "FALLBACK_STATUS=$\($r2.StatusCode\) FALLBACK_LEN=$\($r2.Content.Length\)" } catch { "FALLBACK_FAIL=$\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; docker stop herfbook-web-test 2>&1)

PowerShell($cid = \(docker run -d --name herfbook-web-test -p 8090:80 herfbook-web:test 2>&1\); "CID=$cid"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; docker ps -a --filter name=herfbook-web-test --format "{{.Status}}"; docker logs herfbook-web-test 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20; docker rm -f herfbook-web-test 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker run -d --name herfbook-web-test -p 8090:80 herfbook-web:test; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; docker ps --filter name=herfbook-web-test --format "STATUS={{.Status}} PORTS={{.Ports}}"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8090/; "ROOT_STATUS=$\($r.StatusCode\) ROOT_LEN=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "ROOT_FAIL=$\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8090/_/dev; "FALLBACK_STATUS=$\($r2.StatusCode\) FALLBACK_LEN=$\($r2.Content.Length\)" } catch { "FALLBACK_FAIL=$\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; docker rm -f herfbook-web-test | Out-Null; "REMOVED")
PowerShell(docker exec herfbook-web-test sh -c "ss -tln 2>/dev/null || netstat -tln 2>/dev/null || \(cat /proc/net/tcp | head -10\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker run -d --name herfbook-web-test --network herfbook-dev -p 8090:80 herfbook-web:test | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; "ps:"; docker ps --filter name=herfbook-web-test --format "{{.Status}} {{.Ports}}"; "logs-tail:"; docker logs herfbook-web-test 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4; "root:"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "HTTP=%{http_code} SIZE=%{size_download}`n" http://127.0.0.1:8090/; "fallback:"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "HTTP=%{http_code} SIZE=%{size_download}`n" http://127.0.0.1:8090/_/dev; "asset-html:"; $idx = curl.exe -s http://127.0.0.1:8090/; if \($idx -match 'src="\(/assets/index-[^"]+\\.js\)"'\) { $jsUrl = $matches[1]; "JS_URL=$jsUrl"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "JS_HTTP=%{http_code} JS_SIZE=%{size_download}`n" "http://127.0.0.1:8090$jsUrl" }; docker rm -f herfbook-web-test | Out-Null; "REMOVED")

PowerShell(docker run -d --name herfbook-web-test --network herfbook-dev -p 8090:80 herfbook-web:test | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $idx = \(curl.exe -s http://127.0.0.1:8090/\) -join "`n"; if \($idx -match 'src="\(/assets/index-[^"]+\\.js\)"'\) { $jsUrl = $matches[1]; "JS_URL=$jsUrl"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "JS_HTTP=%{http_code} JS_SIZE=%{size_download}`n" "http://127.0.0.1:8090$jsUrl" } else { "NO_JS_REF_IN_INDEX"; "INDEX_FIRST_300:"; $idx.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $idx.Length\)\) }; docker rm -f herfbook-web-test | Out-Null)
Bash(git -C /c/projects/herfbook add CHANGELOG.md Dockerfile.web Dockerfile.web.dev docker-compose.dev.yml frontend/README.md .dockerignore)

PowerShell($start = Get-Date; docker compose -f C:\\projects\\herfbook\\docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25; $elapsed = \(Get-Date\) - $start; "BUILD_PLUS_UP_ELAPSED=$\([Math]::Round\($elapsed.TotalSeconds, 1\)\)s")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "ps:"; docker compose -f C:\\projects\\herfbook\\docker-compose.dev.yml ps --format "{{.Service}} {{.Status}}"; "root:"; $idx = curl.exe -s http://127.0.0.1:8080/; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "ROOT_HTTP=%{http_code} ROOT_SIZE=%{size_download}`n" http://127.0.0.1:8080/; if \($idx -match 'src="\(/assets/index-[^"]+\\.js\)"'\) { $jsUrl = $matches[1]; "JS_URL=$jsUrl"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "JS_HTTP=%{http_code} JS_SIZE=%{size_download}`n" "http://127.0.0.1:8080$jsUrl" }; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "DEV_HTTP=%{http_code} DEV_SIZE=%{size_download}`n" http://127.0.0.1:8080/_/dev; curl.exe -s http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/health)

PowerShell($idx = \(curl.exe -s http://127.0.0.1:8080/\) -join "`n"; "INDEX_FIRST_500:"; $idx.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $idx.Length\)\); "---"; if \($idx -match 'src="\(/assets/index-[^"]+\\.js\)"'\) { $jsUrl = $matches[1]; "JS_URL=$jsUrl"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "JS_HTTP=%{http_code} JS_SIZE=%{size_download}`n" "http://127.0.0.1:8080$jsUrl" } else { "NO_JS_REF \(placeholder being served\)" })
